research_basis: Google SRE postmortems emphasize preventive action items, clear owners, priorities, tracking bugs, and measurable closeout.
SRE learning-from-failure guidance emphasizes actions that prevent recurrence.
ISO/IEC/IEEE 29119 specifies governed software test processes applicable across lifecycle models.
rules: Every correction must bind to a failure class, owner, priority, tracking reference, and status.
At least one correction must be preventive.
Every correction failure class must have a regression test.
At least one blocking regression test is required.
At least one blocking enforcement hook is required.
Closure controls must require owner, tracking reference, regression pass, receipt, and learning hook.
